commands.summary: The declared jsonschema dependency and its requirements are installed.
Canonical lifecycle, benchmark count, study mapping, threat identifiers, and proposed-state trace all matched their configured research documents and source records.
All 6 focused tests passed, including deliberate duplicate-threat, four-state lifecycle, 21-task, H8-H10, and future-provenance mutations.
Repository governance validation passed with the upstream research consistency gate enabled.
All 118 tests passed; the two declared formal-model obligations remained skipped.
No frozen-surface changes were detected. UTF-8 mode avoids the repository's known Windows console decoding failure.
